title: Ruhroh Data Apps
description: Data-heavy local app tasks that evaluate CSV handling, reconciliation, scheduling, review state, and export workflows.

methodology.retryPolicy: Do not discard failed runs for parser, build, or workflow mistakes; mark only proven environment outages as infra failures.

changelog: 1.0.0: Initial data-apps suite with CSV reconciliation and shift coverage planning.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario must include domain data assets or structured data constraints.
Scenario must require the delivered workspace to transform, review, or export data.
Rubric must include evidence guidance for inspecting both source data and final behavior.
governance.contaminationReview: Bundled data assets should be original fixtures and may be rotated in a new suiteVersion.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Review data tasks for answer-key leakage, hard-coded fixture totals, and workflows that pass without actually parsing or transforming the supplied data.
reviewChecklist: Confirm source data assets are original fixtures or intentionally public fixtures.
Confirm the rubric inspects transformed or exported data, not just UI shell presence.
Confirm expected behavior cannot be satisfied by hard-coding visible sample rows only.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Data assets are frozen within a suiteVersion. Any asset mutation requires a suiteVersion bump.
